Had some of the nicest and some of the rudest people today.
I tryed to stop a moneypak scam today. Asked the 70 year old man what it was for, he said the treasury department emailed him...
...said that he owed them 300$ on a moneypak card. I told him they would never ask for money in that manner. He thanked me and left.
Came back two hours later, said he had talked to the FBI and they said to do it and they would "track" it. #facepalm
I told him to just not do it, he said he had to the FBI told him too and that his computer was locked out till he did it.
Basically to all my older followers, everything is a scam, talk to a young person whom you trust before doing anything.
